info.title: My API
info.description: Production-grade REST API built with Hono, Zod, Drizzle ORM, and Better Auth. Features user management, blog posts, authentication with email/password, role-based access control, and cursor pagination.

get.description: Returns detailed system information. Respects the x-api-version header to return version-specific fields. Requires client identification via x-client-id header.
Returns the current server status, current timestamp, and process uptime. Used by load balancers and monitoring tools to verify the service is operational. No authentication required.

delete.description: Permanently removes a blog post and all associated metadata (view counts, comments, etc.). Only the author or an admin can delete. This action cannot be undone.

patch.description: Partially updates a post. Only the author or an admin can modify a post. Updating status to "published" sets the publication date if it was not previously published.

get.summary: Get a single post by ID.
get.description: Returns the full post content (markdown body), metadata, author information, and view count. Increments the view counter on access.

schema.description: Response (z.infer<ZodObject<{ id: ZodString; title: ZodString; slug: ZodString; content: ZodString; excerpt: ZodNullable<ZodString>; status: ZodEnum<["draft", "published", "archived"]>; authorId: ZodString; viewCount: ZodNumber; publishedAt: ZodNullable<ZodDate>; createdAt: ZodDate; updatedAt: ZodDate; }, "strip", ZodTypeAny, { status: "draft" | "published" | "archived"; authorId: string; id: string; title: string; slug: string; content: string; excerpt: string | null; viewCount: number; publishedAt: Date | null; createdAt: Date; updatedAt: Date; }, { status: "draft" | "published" | "archived"; authorId: string; id: string; title: string; slug: string; content: string; excerpt: string | null; viewCount: number; publishedAt: Date | null; createdAt: Date; updatedAt: Date; }>>)

post.description: Creates a blog post with the authenticated user as the author. Supports draft and published statuses. Published posts get an automatic publication timestamp. Slugs must be unique across all posts.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of blog posts with optional filtering by publication status, author, and full-text search across title and content. Posts are ordered by creation date (newest first).
Returns a paginated list of users with optional role filtering, full-text search by name or email, and cursor-based pagination. Requires admin privileges in production.

post.description: Registers a new user account with name, email, password, and optional role assignment. The password is hashed before storage. Returns the created user profile (without password).

get.summary: Get a single user by ID.
get.description: Returns the full user profile including email, role, avatar, and timestamps. Does not return sensitive fields like password hash.

patch.description: Partially updates a user profile. Only the fields provided in the request body are changed. Admin or the user themselves can update.

delete.description: Permanently removes a user account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone. Requires admin privileges.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's own profile using the session token. Does not require a user ID — derives identity from the auth middleware.
Returns user-specific settings like theme, notifications, and language preferences. Requires a valid session cookie.

post.description: Upload a profile picture. Max 5 MB. Supports jpg, png, webp.

get.description: Returns a raw binary export of all user data in JSON format.
Use GET /users?search=username instead. Will be removed in v2.0.0.

post.description: Invalidates the current session token. After signing out, the token can no longer be used to access protected resources. Subsequent requests must re-authenticate.

post.summary: Sign in with email and password.
post.description: Authenticates a user with their email and password credentials. Returns a session token valid for 7 days and the user profile. The session token should be sent as a Bearer token in the Authorization header.
Creates a new account with email and password. Sends a verification email if email verification is enabled. Returns a session token and the user profile on success.

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: Authentication — sign up, sign in, sign out

tags.name: Users
tags.description: User management — CRUD and profile access

bearerAuth.description: Better Auth session token. Obtain via POST /auth/sign-in or /auth/sign-up.

apiKey.name: X-API-Key
apiKey.description: API key for legacy endpoints. Deprecated — migrate to bearerAuth.

name.description: Display name shown in the UI

email.description: Email address used for login and notifications

image.description: URL to the user's avatar image

title.description: Post title displayed in listings and detail pages

content.description: Full post body in markdown format
